allow: Bash(~/.bun/bin/bun --version && which node 2>/dev/null || echo "node not in PATH")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3001/health 2>/dev/null || echo "server not running \(expected in test\)")

Bash(git add backend/src/api/socketHandlers.js backend/src/core/gameLogic.js backend/src/store/memoryStore.js backend/src/store/redisStore.js frontend/src/main.js frontend/src/pages/game.js frontend/src/pages/home.js frontend/src/pages/lobby.js frontend/src/pages/reveal.js frontend/src/pages/submission.js frontend/src/session.js frontend/src/socket.js frontend/src/state.js frontend/src/style.css CLAUDE.md)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Remove host concept, add live room list, 15-min inactivity timer

- Any player can now start the game, reveal, and play again — no host
- Home page shows a live list of open rooms; players join by clicking,
  no link sharing needed \(removes the mobile link-drop bug\)
- Replace host/player disconnect timers with a single 15-min inactivity
  timer that fires only when every player in a room is offline
- Add listRooms\(\) to memoryStore and redisStore; broadcast roomList to
  all sockets on every room state change
- Remove URL-based routing \(pushState / popstate / getUrlCode\)
- Role card no longer uses red/green border — both roles look identical
  from a distance; colored pill is only legible up close

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git add frontend/src/main.js backend/src/api/socketHandlers.js && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix room list visibility and creator disconnect race condition

- Always connect socket on startup so home-page visitors receive live
  roomList broadcasts \(was only connecting on user interaction\)
- Allow rejoin when server still marks player as connected but the old
  socket ID is no longer in Socket.io's registry \(ping-timeout race
  with long-polling caused creator to stay at 0/1 indefinitely\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add frontend/src/api.js frontend/src/socket.js frontend/src/style.css frontend/src/pages/lobby.js frontend/src/pages/game.js frontend/src/pages/reveal.js frontend/src/pages/submission.js backend/src/api/socketHandlers.js && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add Exit Room button to all in-room pages

- Backend: leaveRoom event removes the player, deletes room if empty,
  broadcasts updated roomState and roomList to remaining players
- Frontend: leftRoom event clears session and returns to home page
- Exit button shown on lobby, submission, game, and reveal pages;
  styled as a secondary understated action below the primary button

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add backend/src/core/gameLogic.js backend/src/api/socketHandlers.js frontend/src/api.js frontend/src/pages/game.js frontend/src/style.css && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add suspicion marking feature during gameplay

- Each player can tap any other player's row to mark/unmark them as suspected
- Suspicion bar \(discrete segments\) next to each player shows total suspicion count
- Your own mark is rendered brighter red; others' marks are dimmer
- Suspicions are stored in round state, reset each round, remapped on reconnect
- Server broadcasts suspicion updates to all players in real time

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add backend/src/core/gameLogic.js backend/src/api/socketHandlers.js frontend/src/api.js frontend/src/pages/game.js frontend/src/style.css && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add spy vote feature with animated results

Vote flow:
- During gameplay, tap ⚖️ next to any player to accuse them as the spy
- A vote overlay appears for all players; accuser auto-votes yes
- Others vote yes/no; accused cannot vote
- Majority of connected non-accused players resolves the vote

Outcomes \(shown as full-screen animated overlay for 3.5 s\):
- Spy caught: accused IS the spy → SPY CAUGHT! → game moves to reveal
- Wrong accusation: accused is innocent → INNOCENT! → they are removed
- Vote fails: no majority → game continues unchanged

Edge cases handled:
- Accused leaves mid-vote → vote cancelled
- Voter disconnects → majority re-checked with remaining connected players
- Vote state remapped on player reconnect
- Vote cleared on next round \(resetToLobby\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add frontend/src/pages/game.js frontend/src/style.css && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Require two-tap confirm before revealing round

First tap turns the button red with "Tap again to confirm" + a brief
pulse animation. Second tap within 5 s fires the reveal. No action or
navigation after 5 s auto-reverts the button to its normal state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add backend/src/api/socketHandlers.js backend/src/core/gameLogic.js frontend/src/api.js frontend/src/pages/game.js frontend/src/style.css && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Require all players to agree before ending the round

Replace two-tap confirm with a collective vote-to-end mechanic:
- Each player taps "End Round" to toggle their readiness
- Button shows live count \(e.g. "End Round · 2 / 4"\) and turns green when voted
- A ✓ badge appears next to ready players in the player list
- Round auto-reveals once every connected player has voted
- If a player disconnects while all others are ready, auto-reveal fires
- Reconnecting player's reveal vote is remapped to their new socket ID

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
